block_00: Here is why you should analyze stocks before trading
block_01: Many traders skip stock analysis when choosing assets for trading. Some “follow the herd” and trade based on random tips from the internet. Others just trade stocks that seem to be going up at the moment. These approaches might work once or twice, but you may need more to get positive trading results on a regular basis.
block_02: To catch the best trading opportunities, you may turn to stock analysis. It involves looking at different market sectors, examining companies’ financial reports and using technical indicators to identify market trends.
block_03: You will find a step-by-step guide to stock analysis in this article. Here you will learn how business cycles affect stock prices, what stocks might perform better during a recession, and which instruments may help achieve positive results.
